rationale: Preset text inputs now preserve in-progress whitespace while typing; values are trimmed only when resolving inputs for expansion. Added a regression test for trailing-space editing.
Review summary comment. The actionable inline comments from the same review were addressed individually.
Template input placeholder normalization now assigns the stripped value once and reuses it.
Apply now relies on the React Query preset detail result instead of performing a duplicate manual fetch; the Apply button is disabled while preset details are loading.
Changing presets clears both visible template input state and the hidden template input memory ref. Added a regression test for stale remembered values after switching presets.
Boolean preset options are now stored as booleans from checkbox changes and resolved without treating the string false as truthy. Added a regression test for unchecked boolean submission.
Automated review summary. The actionable inline comments were addressed individually.
